nodes.label: bulbus cordis myocardium
nodes.description: A myocardium that is part of a bulbus cordis [Automatically generated definition].

nodes.label: outflow tract myocardium
nodes.description: A myocardium that is part of a outflow tract [Automatically generated definition].

nodes.label: myocardial layer
nodes.description: Any of the layers of the myocardium. Example: compact layer, trabecular layer.

nodes.label: conducting system of heart
nodes.description: The cardiac conduction system consists of specialized cardiomyocytes that regulate the frequency of heart beat[GO].

nodes.label: myocardium of atrium
nodes.description: The atrial part of middle layer of the heart, comprised of involuntary muscle.

nodes.label: cardiac muscle tissue of myocardium
nodes.description: A portion of cardiac muscle tissue that is part of a myocardium [Automatically generated definition].

nodes.label: pulmonary myocardium
nodes.description: The pulmonary myocardium is the myocardial tissue present in the pulmonary vein.

nodes.label: myocardium of ventricle
nodes.description: Muscular layer of the cardiac ventricle composed of a compact myocardial layer surrounding the trabecular layer.
